title: Sale in Rosa: Community Expert | Extended | Type 1 | Property Finder

description:
Community Expert | Extended | Type 1
Villa for sale in Rosa, Arabian Ranches 2
Jade & Co Real Estate is pleased to offer this 4 Bedrooms Plus Maids Spanish Design Villa with back Garden Space.
- 4-bedroom Type 1 villa with all bedrooms upstairs for added privacy
- Bright, extended living, dining & kitchen space perfect for family living
- Renovated with elegant modern touches throughout
- Beautifully upgraded garden creating a peaceful outdoor escape
- Charming Spanish classic façade with timeless character
- Ideally located close to the park for a relaxed lifestyle
- Easy access in and out, just near the community entrance
- Immaculately maintained and move-in ready
For viewing schedules and queries please contact Mariam (B.R.N. 53255)
Rosa, addition phase in Arabian Ranches two living. These villas are beautifully designed and optimized for family-centric living.
You can choose from a variety of 144 homes, including four, five, and six-bedroom options, each with private plots for gardens and outdoor decks. The neighbourhood skyline is characterized by low-pitched terracotta tiled roofs.
The interior design is impeccably styled, offering a unique interpretation of a sophisticated modern Spanish palette.
Nearby Attractions and amenities:
Swimming pool
Barbecue Facilities
Kids play area
Football pitches
Squash and tennis courts
Gymnasium
Beauty Salon and spa
Jade & Co was founded to provide a boutique approach to the Dubai Real Estate market, which caters way beyond beautiful properties, as our exceptional agents source a lifestyle to compliment you. Our purpose is to provide an unrivalled service in the market, whether you are buying, selling, or renting, and our approach allows us to walk alongside our clients at every stage of their journey. For Jade & Co, maintaining long-lasting relationships is at the core of our agency.
Jade & Co Real Estate
Office: 610 The Onyx Tower 1, The Greens, Dubai, UAE

title: Sale in Rosa: Type 2 | Renovated | Must See | Property Finder
description:
Type 2 | Renovated | Must See
Villa for sale in Rosa, Arabian Ranches 2
Introducing a rarely available, owner-occupied, exquisite villa in the illustrious Arabian Ranches 2 - Rosa community. This charismatic villa is an archetype of well-thought-out design and an internal location offering absolute peace for those who cherish tranquility. This property is an exclusive listing by Espace Real Estate. The brand-new, recently upgraded villa houses four luxuriously appointed bedrooms, with an additional room offering flexibility as a Maid's and Family Area. The fantastic layout encapsulates a built-up area of 4354 sqft., providing your family ample space to create treasured moments. The ground floor has a special attribute of a bedroom, ensuring convenient accessibility for all residents. The plot expands over a generous 6889 sqft that peers out to a quiet location. This immersive experience of tranquillity is a unique selling proposition that sets this villa apart from the rest in Rosa. Espace Real Estate takes pride in presenting such an exclusive property that soothes the senses with its quiet location, while also humbly boasting its myriad of features and amenities. As you step inside this beautiful space, you'll appreciate the upgraded features that enhance the sophistication and utility of the property.

description:
Exceptional Villa | Prime Location |Special Layout
Villa for sale in Yasmin, Arabian Ranches 2
4-Bedroom + Maid Villa in Yasmin, Arabian Ranches
Located in Arabian Ranches, Yasmin is one of the most sought-after villa enclaves developed by Emaar Properties, offering a peaceful, upscale lifestyle in the heart of Dubai.
This 4-bedroom plus maid’s room villa is designed with both comfort and functionality in mind, making it ideal for families. The property typically features spacious open-plan living and dining areas, a modern kitchen with quality finishes, and large windows that bring in natural light. All four bedrooms are well-proportioned, with built-in wardrobes, while the master suite often includes a walk-in closet, en-suite bathroom, and private balcony overlooking the garden.
The maid’s room is conveniently located for privacy and practicality, and the villa usually includes additional storage, covered parking, and a generously sized private garden—perfect for outdoor entertaining or family time.
Residents of Yasmin enjoy a tranquil, family-friendly environment with landscaped parks, walking paths, and access to community amenities such as swimming pools and sports facilities. The nearby Arabian Ranches Golf Club adds to the lifestyle appeal, along with easy connectivity to major roads and key destinations across Dubai.
This home combines space, elegance, and community living, making it an excellent choice for those seeking a refined suburban lifestyle.

Extended & Upgraded | Furnished | 4 Bed + Maids

Unique extended and fully upgraded 4 bedroom villa in one of Rasha's most sought-after positions.
Property Highlights:
-Extended villa - larger than standard BUA
-4 Bedrooms + Maids Room
-Fully upgraded throughout - premium finishes, fixtures and fittings
-Sold fully furnished with furniture made specifically for this villa
-Smart home system
-Integrated sound system
-Covered parking
-Quiet internal location
This is one of those listings that stands out immediately - not because of the marketing, but because of what has actually been done to the property. The villa has been thoughtfully extended beyond its original footprint and upgraded to a genuinely high standard, with premium finishes carried consistently through every room creating a perfect space for families.
The extension of the main living space is flooding the interior with natural light and giving the home a sense.
Upstairs, four well-proportioned bedrooms include:
-a master suite with a walk-in wardrobe, upgraded en-suite bathroom and private terrace;
-a bedroom with upgraded en-suite bathroom;
-2 bedrooms converted to a space for children with a separate bathroom between the rooms.
Outside, plenty of space for the family and guests, jacuzzi, grill zone - a turn-key home that requires nothing more than a family to move in.
Community — Rasha, Arabian Ranches 2:
Rasha is a gated sub-community within Arabian Ranches 2, offering a calm, well-maintained environment with tree-lined streets and a genuine sense of neighbourhood. The community sits off Al Qudra Road with straightforward access to the E311 highway.
For further details or to arrange a private viewing, please get in touch directly with Aurelijus Jakavickas.

description:
Single Row | Great Investment | Rented
Townhouse for sale in Camelia 2, Camelia
Paragon Properties is delighted to present this 3BR + Maids Townhouse in one of the most sought-after, family friendly communities, Camelia in Arabian Ranches 2. A single row unit is rare to find. Located close to the community Pool, Park, Kids play area and fully equipped gym - this is a great option for both end users and investors.
- 3 Bedrooms + Maids
- BUA: 1988 sq.ft
- Plot 1507 sq. ft
- Single Row unit a short walk away from the Pool, Park & Fully Equipped Gym
- Well maintained and looked after
- RENTED: by a lovely family who are treating it as their own. Contact me for more details.
- Viewings available with advance notice (schedule dependent).
As you enter through the front door straight down the passage is the open plan kitchen, dining and living area. The ground floor also has a powder room, en-suite maids room, laundry room and spacious storage room under the stairs.
Up the stairs to the first floor there are two bedrooms which share a balcony and common bathroom, and the master bedroom with an en-suite bathroom, spacious built-in wardrobes and private balcony.
The Camelia Community has "The Ranches Souk" nearby - your convenient community destination featuring cafe's and name brands like Cafe Bateel, Paul's, Carrefour Market & Carluccios plus many more shops & services. Arabian Ranches 2 also has a very popular school, a childrens nursery and a Fitness First gym within the community.
• Dubai Motor City: 13 Minutes
• Victory Heights Primary School: 14 Minutes
• The Mall of the Emirates: 21 Minutes
• Dubai International Airport: 29 Minutes

Townhouse for sale in Camelia 2, Camelia

title: Sale in Azalea: 3BR+Maid | No Commission | Vacant | Single Row | Property Finder
description:
3BR+Maid | No Commission | Vacant | Single Row
Villa for sale in Azalea, Arabian Ranches 2
Tucked away in the peaceful greenery of Azalea, this elegant 3-bedroom villa offers the kind of family lifestyle Arabian Ranches 2 is known for — private, spacious, and thoughtfully designed for comfortable everyday living.
Developed by Emaar, Azalea is one of the most charming enclaves within Arabian Ranches 2, where contemporary Arabic architecture meets landscaped streets, quiet parks, and a true sense of community. This vacant single-row villa is perfectly positioned for those who value privacy, open space, and a calm residential setting away from the city’s pace.
Inside, the home opens into a bright and welcoming living and dining area designed for both family time and entertaining. Large windows allow natural light to flow through the interiors, creating an airy atmosphere throughout the day. The kitchen is fitted with sleek cabinetry and practical storage, while the maid’s room adds extra functionality for modern family needs.
Upstairs, the bedrooms are generously sized with built-in wardrobes and well-appointed bathrooms, creating comfortable private spaces for every member of the household. Outside, the private garden offers a quiet retreat — ideal for morning coffee, weekend gatherings, or simply enjoying Dubai’s cooler evenings.
Life in Azalea is built around outdoor living and connection. Residents enjoy beautifully maintained walking trails, swimming pools for adults and children, barbecue areas, playgrounds, and lush green parks woven throughout the community. Beyond Azalea itself, Arabian Ranches 2 offers football pitches, volleyball courts, outdoor fitness spaces, and regular community events that bring families together.
With its vacant status, no commission, and highly sought-after single-row location, this villa presents an excellent opportunity for families looking to move into one of Dubai’s most established villa communities.
My name is Aleksandr Kim, and I would be delighted to arrange a private viewing.

Spacious Layout l 5 BR Villa l Brand New
Villa for sale in Samara, Arabian Ranches 2
Welcome to this stunning 5-bedroom villa located in the serene and family-friendly community of Samara, Arabian Ranches 2. Ideal for those seeking a quiet and comfortable lifestyle,
This unfurnished villa offers a perfect blend of modern living and suburban charm. Enjoy your morning coffee on the sunny balcony with breathtaking views, and relax in the spacious walk-in closet for organizing your fashion.
The villa features a private garden offering a green space for relaxation, perfect for family gatherings and rest. With a dedicated covered parking to protect your vehicle and a pet-friendly environment, your lifestyle needs are well taken care of. Stay active in the shared gym equipped with the latest equipment, and entertain your children in the dedicated play area with safe equipment.
Arabian Ranches 2 is known for its peaceful, suburban vibe, with tree-lined streets, landscaped parks, and plenty of walking and cycling paths.
The community is well-connected, with easy access to nearby attractions like Global Village, Dubai Miracle Garden, and the Ranches Souk, which offers shops, cafes, and essentials. The area is also close to multiple schools, healthcare facilities, and supermarkets, ensuring that all your daily needs are easily met. Don't miss this opportunity to own a piece of serene living in one of Dubai's most sought-after communities.
Contact us today to schedule a viewing and experience the lifestyle that awaits you in Samara, Arabian Ranches 2.

title: Sale in Palma: Arabian Ranches 2 4 BR Villa with Garden | Property Finder
agency_name: NEW CASA REAL ESTATE BROKER L.L.C
description:
Arabian Ranches 2 4 BR Villa with Garden
Villa for sale in Palma, Arabian Ranches 2
Life transforms when space flows around you rather than constricts you, and this Arabian Ranches 2 villa creates precisely that atmosphere. Spread across 4,603 sqft on two generous levels, the home breathes with light, room to move, and thoughtful touches that turn everyday living into something special. Designed for families who appreciate both privacy and comfort, the layout welcomes you into a welcoming foyer that guides you naturally through living and dining areas framed by large windows. Four well-proportioned bedrooms include a master retreat complete with a walk-in closet and private balcony, three additional bedrooms each offering built-in wardrobes for tidy living, and a dedicated study for quiet concentration or personal projects. Five bathrooms ensure convenience for everyone, while the semi-furnished arrangement provides the perfect canvas to layer in your personal style. Central air conditioning maintains perfect climate control, and the private garden outside becomes your daily retreat. Beyond the walls, this villa connects to a life of ease and leisure. Step onto your own private balcony or escape to the lush private garden where mornings begin with birdsong and evenings unwind in tranquility. The home includes covered parking for two vehicles, a maid’s room for added convenience, and kitchen appliances that make cooking a pleasure rather than a chore. Pets are welcome here, making this an ideal home for families who value companionship and outdoor living. Arabian Ranches 2 itself feels like a breath of fresh air—spacious landscaped grounds, serene walking paths, and a strong sense of community. You’ll find a children’s play area and pool just steps away, a shared gym for maintaining your routine, and security that ensures peace of mind. The community also features a children’s pool and a view of a local landmark, adding character to everyday life. Just minutes away, Global Village and Dubai Miracle Garden offer seasonal magic, while the nearby Arabian Ranches Golf Club and Dubai Polo & Equestrian Club provide green spaces for sport and relaxation. At 7,450,000 AED, this property represents more than a purchase—it’s an investment in a peaceful, well-connected suburban lifestyle surrounded by green spaces, family-friendly amenities, and the quiet dignity of Arabian Ranches 2. Viewing this exceptional villa is the next step toward a home where every day feels like a slower, sweeter rhythm.<
